allow: Bash(node -e "const { DatabaseSync } = require\(''node:sqlite''\); const db = new DatabaseSync\('':memory:''\); db.exec\(''CREATE TABLE t \(x TEXT\)''\); db.prepare\(''INSERT INTO t VALUES \(?\)''\).run\(''hello''\); const row = db.prepare\(''SELECT * FROM t''\).get\(\); console.log\(''node:sqlite OK -'', row\);")
